title: Face Stealer
description:
Somewhere, in a cursed corner of the world, lies the Flesh Biome — a disturbing place where the land itself seems alive.
The blocks here are grotesque — soft, fleshy, and stitched together from human skin and meat
body:
Somewhere, in a cursed corner of the world, lies the Flesh Biome — a disturbing place where the land itself seems alive.
The blocks here are grotesque — soft, fleshy, and stitched together from human skin and meat.

In the middle of this nightmare roams the Skin Facetealer — a towering, terrifying man sewn from the faces of countless victims.
🩸 Every time you strike him, he strikes you back — tearing away bits of your own skin in return.
🩸 Fighting him is a gamble, because with each hit you feel yourself becoming part of his collection.
🩸 But if you manage to kill him, he drops four unique masks, each crafted from the stolen faces of others.

😷 When you wear these masks, they grant you powerful abilities… but you’ll never feel quite yourself again.
Be warned: every second you spend in the Flesh Biome, it feels more alive — and more wrong.

🖤 From the Author:
I created this mod to give players a truly unsettling biome and boss fight — one that forces you to weigh the risk of attacking, and the horror of staying.
The Skin Facetealer is not just a fight — it’s a test of your nerve.

⚙️ Requirements:
✅ Requires gekolib 1.20.1
